mission.objective: Execute the consolidated fix manifest atomically (Tier 0 → 1 → 2 → 3 → U), one commit per fix-group, HTML parse verification + canon-pattern grep after each. Implement the Tier U ROI upgrade as final commit. Drive to manifest-complete or surface BLOCKED cleanly.
mission.founder_feedback: [RESOLVED-AT-DISPATCH — orchestrator MUST replace this placeholder with verbatim founder quote OR explicit 'ORCHESTRATOR_FORWARDS_FROM_MANIFEST: <path>' before invoking Senior Dev. Static dispatch = stale brief = failed gate.]
mission.success_metric: Every fix lands as atomic commit with conventional message. HTML parses after every commit. Acceptance grep checks pass. Tier U upgrade ships production-grade with fallback.

scope._scope_policy: FULL-SITE coverage. Senior Developer holds the whole site in context while executing fix-by-fix. Atomic commits stay narrow, but each commit's review verifies no ripple-effect breakage across header/footer/other-pages/widgets.
scope.scope_note: primary_focus_surfaces lists what the current fix sprint targets. Senior Developer's commits target those surfaces, but verification (HTML parse + canon grep + diff) runs against the whole document — confirms nothing outside primary scope regressed.

performance_baseline.font_loading: self-hosted woff2, font-display: swap, preload critical

roi_upgrade.mandate: Implement exactly 1 high-ROI advanced web-platform feature as Tier U commit per the Upgrade Mandate.
category_options: CSS scroll-driven animation on .hero__bg.parallax via animation-timeline: scroll() — replaces JS rAF, deletes ~22 LOC, 120fps native, Safari fallback
View-transitions API choreography between Cover → Hero → Voice → Spread (document.startViewTransition with crossfade)
CSS Houdini paint worklet for animated gradient overlay on hero (registerPaint, fallback to static linear-gradient)
Container queries on .spread__tile to swap layouts at component-relative breakpoints (not viewport)
:has() selector chain for state-driven palette switching (parent inherits child collection context)
color-mix() at-runtime palette derivation from --sr-accent (tints/shades without preprocessor)
@scope rule to isolate spread-tile hover effects from BR page palette overrides
CSS @starting-style for first-render entrance animations (no JS observer needed)
Native CSS anchor positioning for tooltip / popover on tile hover

constraints.staging_rule: Stage ONLY docs/brand/design-mockups/v2.html per commit (no git add -A)
constraints.branch_rule: Work on main, do not push, do not amend prior commits

loop_wrapper.acceptance_check: html parses + canon-pattern grep counts match expected + git diff shows only target file

memory.write_mandate: Write at least 1 memory entry per dispatch when you compose two CSS systems that conflict (e.g., scroll-driven anim + rAF parallax), discover a browser support quirk requiring `@supports`/feature-detection guard, OR commit-discipline lesson (atomic vs batch). Include exact code excerpt + fallback strategy.
